The '''Joint Defense Operations Staff''' were [[Officer/Legends|members]] of the [[Advisor/Legends|advisory]] board that advised the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] on all [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|defense]]-related matters. [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] wore its uniform instead of his [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] battle dress while addressing the New Republic [[Senate Defense Council/Legends|Defense Council]] after [[Operation Hammerblow]].

{{Nr-stub}}
